[textmode.js](../../../../../index.md) / [media](../../../index.md) / [TextmodeVideo](../../TextmodeVideo.md) / stop

# Method: stop()

```ts
stop(): void;
```

Stop the video and seek to the beginning.

## Returns

`void`
